flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Tidewater Community College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (13.6k → 12.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Tidewater Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Tidewater Community College rose 51% between 2006 and 2009 (8.9% → 13.5%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Tidewater Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (56.6% → 63.8%).
